title: Allow for naming via column values
excerpt: In the automations, allow for naming of items or groups based on a specific value in a column. For example, if an item is assigned to John Doe, move the item to group John Doe. This can be done manually when you know in …

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the automations, allow for naming of items or groups based on a specific value in a column. For example, if an item is assigned to John Doe, move the item to group John Doe. This can be done manually when you know in advance what the users/statuses/dropdown values will be, and if there are a few of them. But, when I want to set up a board for other users to use, with many values, it’s not really possible to do this via automation - by specifying exact values.
Therefore, it would be very helpful if when setting up a new group/moving an item to a group, to be able to name it based on a column value for that item that the automation is being triggered through. (Similar to how integration software work)
